lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Hello there. Have you found my son yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: I suggest you begin your search by talking to my family and servants. One of them might know where he's gone.

lines.speaker: Butler Jarvis
lines.text: Good day, [sir/madam].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. I'm helping Lord Hosidius find his missing son. I was wondering if you could help me.

lines.speaker: Butler Jarvis
lines.text: I'm afraid I know not where Artur has gone. I do not speak to him much. He keeps himself to himself.

lines.speaker: Butler Jarvis
lines.text: However, I've noticed him speaking to Olivia before. Maybe she can help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks.

lines.speaker: Butler Jarvis
lines.text: Good day [sir/madam]. I hope your quest is going well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. I...

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: You're the one helping to find our son.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I...

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: It's good that you're here to help. Artur is a good lad, but he does have a habit of biting off more than he can chew.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering if...

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: He's meant for greatness you know. He'll be a king one day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't you mean...

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: Lord. I meant to say lord. Now be on your way. Artur needs your help.

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Please bring Artur back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where should I be looking again?

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: He's been spending a lot of time in the Arceuus Library. He mentioned a librarian called Galana. Maybe she can help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, I'm helping Lord Hosidius find his missing son. I was wondering if you had any idea where he might have gone?

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: I'm sorry, but I don't know anything.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Well... I err...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err?

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Oh this is awful. Please don't tell Lord Hosidius. He'll fire me if he finds out.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Calm down, you have nothing to fear from me. I just want to help find Artur. Do you know where he is?

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Artur and I, we're...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're in love aren't you?

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Yes...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well don't worry, your secret is safe with me.

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Thank you. Before he went missing, Artur told me he was going to find the original copy of the Royal Accord of Twill. That's where he will have gone.

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: He's been spending a lot of time in the Arceuus Library recently, researching the Accord. He mentioned a librarian called Galana. Maybe she can help you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Please bring Artur back.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: I am Lord Kandur Hosidius, ruler of this city. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name].

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Pleased to meet you [player name]. It is a shame we could not meet in better circumstances.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything I can help you with?

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Our family is in dire need of assistance. Alas, I do not feel I can trust you enough to involve you in this.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Our family is in dire need of assistance. My eldest son, Artur, has gone missing and we could desperately use some help in finding him.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Would you be willing to assist us? You will be rewarded if you bring him home safe.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can help. What do you need me to do?

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Thank you friend. I suggest you begin your search by talking to my family and servants. One of them might know where Artur has gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No. I'm afraid I have other things to be doing.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that. If you change your mind please return to me as soon as you can.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Goodbye.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Until next time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you remind me where I can find that book on the Accord?

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: Try the [top/middle/bottom] floor, [north/south] [eastern/western] bay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: Do you need something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for information on the Royal Accord of Twill.

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: The Royal Accord of Twill was signed by the heads of Kourend's five houses, known then as the Royal Lords. This was over a thousand years ago.

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: The Accord declared that they would take over rulership of Great Kourend from the Council of Elders.

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: For many years after the Accord was signed, the Royal Lords took it in turns to rule the kingdom. Each of them ruled for ten years in turn.

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: Those practices have long since been abolished though and Kourend is now ruled by the Kourend Council. The original Accord has since been lost, but copies still exist in this library.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I wanted to find the original?

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: Many have tried and failed. You would likely have no better luck. However, if it interests you, you might wish to read The Envoy to Varlamore, by Deryk Paulson.

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: It details how the original Accord was lost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where I can find the book?

lines.speaker: Galana
lines.text: Try the [top/middle/bottom] floor, [north/south] [eastern/western] bay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Crikey!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ouch!

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Have you killed that snake yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: The sooner you kill it, the sooner I can head home.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Hello. I wasn't expecting to see anyone else down here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you Artur Hosidius?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: That's me. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name]. Your father sent me to find you. He's worried about you.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: He really shouldn't worry, I'm fine. I'll head home as soon as I've finished here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well could I help speed things along in some way? I promised him I'd get you home.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Now that you mention it, I could use some help. There's a chest in the next cave with something important in it. It's got a big snake guarding it though.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: By something important do you mean the Royal Accord of Twill?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: How did you know that?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do you think I found you?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Oh. Well as you already seem to know, yes I'm here looking for the Royal Accord of Twill. I think it's in that chest, but the snake is in the way. Could you kill it for me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can't you do it yourself?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: I tried, but I'm not very good at fighting.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Typical. Fine, I'll kill the snake. Just wait here.

sections.title: Talking to Artur Hosidius after killing the snake

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's dead.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Great. Now we just need to empty that chest. Would you mind?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine. Wait here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've emptied that chest.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found the Accord.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Great! Hand it over then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet. You'll get it once you've returned home.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Eugh. Fine, I'll go home. But you'd better not run off with the Accord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you want the Accord anyway?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Why wouldn't I want it? The signing of the Accord marked the start of a golden age. Once the Royal Lords replaced the Council of Elders, Kourend prospered like never before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But that was a long time ago. Why does it matter now?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Because I think it's time for another golden age. The Kourend Council, like the Council of Elders before them, have failed to do a good job in running this kingdom.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And you think the five houses would do a better job?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Exactly.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What makes you say the Council have done a bad job?

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: More crime. Fewer homes. More illness. Loss of jobs. The list goes on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But aren't the five houses partially to blame as well? They rule the cities.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: The Council sets the laws and the Council sets the budgets. We have to do as they say, just like everyone else.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmmm, fair enough. Anyway, we'd better get off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fair enough. Now let's be off.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I won't. Now let's get going.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Artur.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: Hello [player name]. Thanks for your help in recovering the Accord.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No problem.

lines.speaker: Artur Hosidius
lines.text: You should talk to my father. He will probably want to reward you.

sections.title: Talking to Chef Olivia after Artur returns

lines.speaker: Chef Olivia
lines.text: Thank you for bringing Artur home safe.

sections.title: Talking to Butler Jarvis after Artur returns

lines.speaker: Butler Jarvis
lines.text: Good day [sir/madam]. On behalf of the Hosidius family, I thank you for bringing Artur home.

sections.title: Talking to Elena Hosidius after Artur returns

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: Thank you for finding our son. You've done this kingdom a great service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's no...

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: I do wonder if his father could have done more though. My brother would have had the entire army out searching.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your brother...

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: My brother is Lord Shiro Shayzien. He commands the Shayzien Army. A luxury my husband doesn't have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you...

lines.speaker: Elena Hosidius
lines.text: Maybe it doesn't always have to be that way. Things may well soon be different. Now be on your way, I have things to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Hello there. Artur is safely back home again. I hear we have you to thank for that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All in a days work.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: He also said that you managed to recover the original copy of the Royal Accord of Twill.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did. I don't have it with me though.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Well go fetch it and bring it here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did. I assume you'll be wanting it.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Yes. I'll make sure it's well looked after. Now as for that reward I promised.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Is there anything else I can do for you?

sections.title: Talking to Lord Hosidius again before getting the full reward

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Lord Kandur Hosidius
lines.text: I assume you're after that reward I promised you. Here you go.
